aristotle_apix_bleed.citation: Granger CB, Alexander JH, McMurray JJV, et al. Apixaban versus warfarin in patients with atrial fibrillation. N Engl J Med. 2011;365(11):981-992. doi:10.1056/NEJMoa1107039

aristotle_apix_stroke.citation: Granger CB, Alexander JH, McMurray JJV, et al. Apixaban versus warfarin in patients with atrial fibrillation. N Engl J Med. 2011;365(11):981-992. doi:10.1056/NEJMoa1107039

hamberg_ss_inr_wildtype.citation: Hamberg AK, Dahl ML, Barber TM, et al. A PK-PD model for predicting the impact of age, CYP2C9, and VKORC1 genotype on individualization of warfarin therapy. Clin Pharmacol Ther. 2007;81(4):529-538. doi:10.1038/sj.clpt.6100084
hamberg_ss_inr_wildtype.endpoint: Steady-state INR in CYP2C9 *1/*1, VKORC1 GG, age 65, 75 kg on 5 mg/day
hamberg_ss_inr_wildtype.notes: Derived from Hamberg PK-PD simulation: wild-type genotype at age 65, 75 kg on 5 mg/day reaches mid-therapeutic INR.

hirsh_therapeutic_conc_mid.citation: Hirsh J, Warkentin TE, Shaughnessy SG, et al. Heparin and low-molecular-weight heparin: mechanisms of action, pharmacokinetics, dosing, monitoring, efficacy, and safety. Chest. 2001;119(1 Suppl):64S-94S. doi:10.1378/chest.119.1_suppl.64s
hirsh_therapeutic_conc_mid.endpoint: Heparin plasma level at therapeutic aPTT (midpoint)
hirsh_therapeutic_conc_mid.notes: Therapeutic range 0.2-0.4 U/mL; midpoint used for fit.

iwpc_days_to_therapeutic.citation: The International Warfarin Pharmacogenetics Consortium. Estimation of the warfarin dose with clinical and pharmacogenetic data. N Engl J Med. 2009;360(8):753-764. doi:10.1056/NEJMoa0809329
iwpc_days_to_therapeutic.endpoint: Days until INR enters 2.0-3.0 on appropriate dose
iwpc_days_to_therapeutic.notes: IWPC and standard-of-care literature: therapeutic INR is generally achieved within 5-10 days on the IWPC-predicted dose; 7 days used as the point target.

iwpc_mean_maintenance_dose.citation: The International Warfarin Pharmacogenetics Consortium. Estimation of the warfarin dose with clinical and pharmacogenetic data. N Engl J Med. 2009;360(8):753-764. doi:10.1056/NEJMoa0809329
iwpc_mean_maintenance_dose.notes: Published as 5.2 ± 2.8 mg/day; CI here treats ±SD as a plausible interval rather than a formal 95% CI.

wan_aptt_ttr_standard_of_care.citation: Wan Y, Heneghan C, Perera R, Roberts N, Hollowell J, Glasziou P, Bankhead C, Xu Y. Anticoagulation control and prediction of adverse events in patients with atrial fibrillation: a systematic review. Circ Cardiovasc Qual Outcomes. 2008;1(2):84-91. doi:10.1161/CIRCOUTCOMES.108.796185
wan_aptt_ttr_standard_of_care.endpoint: aPTT time-in-therapeutic-range target from antithrombotic-stewardship systematic review
wan_aptt_ttr_standard_of_care.notes: Standard-of-care aPTT time-in-therapeutic-range target drawn from antithrombotic-stewardship systematic review; used as a heparin-fit residual benchmark.

raschke_aptt_6h.citation: Raschke RA, Reilly BM, Guidry JR, et al. The weight-based heparin dosing nomogram compared with a standard care nomogram. A randomized controlled trial. Ann Intern Med. 1993;119(9):874-881. doi:10.7326/0003-4819-119-9-199311010-00002
raschke_aptt_6h.endpoint: Mean aPTT at 6h after 80 U/kg bolus + 18 U/kg/hr
raschke_aptt_6h.notes: Therapeutic aPTT range 60-100s; reported cohort mean ~75s at 6 hours on weight-based nomogram.
